## Release — backlog-campaign v0.15.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.15.0

**Autonomy default flip (ADR-012 E5).** `.blackhole/config.json`'s `autonomy.enabled` now
defaults to `true` in the shipped config template. Two thinking-route classes activate, and one
stays deliberately pinned off:

- **Design autonomy** (`design_autonomy: true`, now live) — design-track issues may promote
  directly to an ADR inside their own PR when the blind-critic scoring and the deterministic
  `scripts/design-aggregate.ts` verdict agree, instead of always pausing for a human. The planner
  never self-certifies this path — only the script's computed `status: "ready"` reaches it.
- **Analyze routing** (`analyze_routing: true`, now live) — large (`size:l`+) or design-flagged
  issues now automatically get an evidence-gathering `investigator` `analyze` pass before
  planning, producing a read-only analysis note with no terminal or merge semantics.
- **Brainstorm routing** (`brainstorm_routing: false`, pinned OFF) — brainstorm-routed issues
  close as *satisfied-by-children* with **no reviewable PR** (terminal-closure semantics,
  ADR-010 D3). That product judgement stays opt-in and is **not** activated by this flip. The
  `autonomy.enabled && autonomy.brainstorm_routing` conjunction at the brainstorm dispatch site
  stays inert because the second operand is `false`.

The `never_bypass` floor (`["destructive", "credentials", "epic-go-no-go"]`) is **unchanged** —
irreversible/credential/epic-go-no-go actions still force human escalation regardless of
confidence score.

### 📣 Observable behavior change for campaign operators

Campaigns will **stop pausing at design gates they previously always paused at** (design issues
can now resolve autonomously when confidence and dominance permit), and will **begin dispatching
`needs_analysis` routes** for `size:l`+ and design-flagged issues that were previously inert.

### ⚠️ Verification status — read before running a campaign with this live

This flip shipped **without a prior green campaign run under M0–M4** (the milestone's Entry Gate
row 6 was waived by explicit maintainer decision). The design/analyze write paths (ADR-011/012,
milestones M0–M4) passed unit-level review and the full structural gate (`bun run verify` 29/29,
`bun test` 529/0), but have **not yet been exercised end-to-end by a real autonomous dispatch**.
The milestone's T3 verification — running one live campaign and confirming its four criteria
(substantive escalations only; zero unintended brainstorm dispatch; design gates resolve/block
correctly; analyze dispatch fires for a qualifying issue) — **remains outstanding** and should be
observed on the next campaign. Treat the first live run as the verification pass.

### ⏪ Rollback

Set `autonomy.enabled: false` in `.blackhole/config.json` to restore the prior (pre-flip)
behavior **exactly** — all three dispatch sites fall back to their existing `enabled`-gated
`false` branches. This single config value is the entire rollback; no other change ships in this
release.
